Contact Profile: <From Bulldog> Edwards is one of the on-air personalities on "The Scott and Erica Morning Show," a topical, lifestyle-oriented morning show that deals with topical issues facing women between 25-54. "What I'm looking for is celebrity guests," he says. "I also look for surveys and statistics that relate to our audience that will get the phones ringing." He turned a magazine study showing that 73% of women would rather have $1 million than have Jennifer Aniston's body into a phone topic. Anywhere from 5-15 celebrities appear on the show each week. "The celebrities we have on are all television, movie and music stars," he says. "They're all household names." Recent guests have included Bill Cosby, Matt Damon, Ellen DeGeneres, Bob Sagat, Elisabeth Hasselbeck, Dr. Drew and Mariel Hemingway. Reach him by email.

Contact Profile: <From Bulldog> Edwards is one of the on-air personalities on "The Scott and Erica Morning Show," a topical, lifestyle-oriented morning show that deals with topical issues facing women between 25-54. "What I'm looking for is celebrity guests," he says. "I also look for surveys and statistics that relate to our audience that will get the phones ringing." He turned a magazine study showing that 73% of women would rather have $1 million than have Jennifer Aniston's body into a phone topic. Anywhere from 5-15 celebrities appear on the show each week. "The celebrities we have on are all television, movie and music stars," he says. "They're all household names." Recent guests have included Bill Cosby, Matt Damon, Ellen DeGeneres, Bob Sagat, Elisabeth Hasselbeck, Dr. Drew and Mariel Hemingway. Reach him by email.
